creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=7d912fd4d5cccb7a6fda2082655c5db179e89dac

commit 7d912fd4d5cccb7a6fda2082655c5db179e89dac
Author:     Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2023-06-02 07:01:56 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-06-05 06:18:30 +0000

    multimedia/elementary-videos: update to 2.9.1

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/elementary/videos/releases/tag/2.9.1

     * Application: store repeat state in an Action
     * Create PlaybackManager
     * actions/checkout@v3
     * Move playback and pipeline to PlaybackManager
     * Objects.Video: remove unused properties, signals, functions
     * Bump docker/setup-qemu-action from 1 to 2
     * Bump bilelmoussaoui/flatpak-github-actions from 4 to 5
     * Switch to GHCR containers
     * Update flatpak actions to new namespace
     * Bump runtime to 7.2
     * Bump flatpak/flatpak-github-actions from 5 to 6
     * Metainfo Improvements

    PR:             271771
    Reported by:    duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
    Approved by:    miguel@gocobachi.dev (maintainer)

 multimedia/elementary-videos/Makefile  | 3 +--
 multimedia/elementary-videos/distinfo  | 6 +++---
 multimedia/elementary-videos/pkg-plist | 2 +-
 3 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
